name: Roasted Garlic Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap each head of garlic in aluminum foil. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
2. Separate the garlic cloves from their skins. Squeeze out any excess liquid.
3. Spread the roasted garlic thinly on melba rounds or toasts.
Makes 20 servings. Preparation time: About 15 to 18 minutes. Cooking time:
About 1 hour.
